name: Szechuan Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 chicken breast halves, boned and skinned (or other meat--see above)
1 teaspoon vinegar (rice or rice wine vinegar works best)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 teaspoons sugar, vinegar, dry sherry, and 3 tablespoons soy sauce in a bowl.
2. In another bowl, mix 1 tablespoon soy sauce and cornstarch.
3. Cut the chicken into pieces measuring 1/2 to 1 inch.
4. Combine the chicken with the soy sauce/cornstarch mixture.
5. Heat oil in a wok and add red pepper flakes. Cook for about 10 seconds.
6. Add the chicken meat and stir-fry for approximately 1 minute, then remove from heat.
7. Stir-fry ginger, green onions, and garlic in the remaining oil for about 1 minute.
8. Return the chicken to the wok and add the sugar/vinegar/sherry/soy sauce mixture.
9. Stir-fry for another minute.
10. Serve over hot rice.
